info.title: Ynovee Hotel Booking API
info.description: REST API for the Ynovee Hotel Booking System. Supports room management, bookings, Stripe payments, and content management.

icon.description: Icon URL or upload via multipart

post.description: Login with email or username. Returns a Sanctum Bearer token.

422.description: Email not found or validation error

200.description: List of bookings with room type

post.description: Creates a booking after checking room availability. Calculates total_price automatically.

422.description: Room not available or validation error

delete.description: Sets booking status to 'cancelled', immediately releasing room inventory.

post.description: Calculates total price and creates a Stripe PaymentIntent. Returns the client secret for frontend confirmation.

image.description: Image URL or upload via multipart

get.description: Returns all room types. Optionally filter by availability and guest capacity.
Returns all settings as a flat key-value object.

post.description: Pass a flat key-value JSON object. Each key is upserted.

image.description: Image URL or upload via multipart

post.description: Books a tour. Calculates total_price automatically based on guests and selected currency.

422.description: Guest count exceeds maximum or validation error

sanctum.description: Enter the Bearer token obtained from POST /api/auth/login
